name: Sphere Shootout
short_description: This is a 2D cover-based tactical shooter game where the key to victory lies not in shooting skills, but in tactical movement.
detailed_description:
Sphere Shootout

As a solo developer with 15 years of programming experience, I stripped away all the flashy distractions to focus on one thing: pure, unadulterated combat gameplay. Sphere Shootout is my love letter to hardcore tactical shooters.

Outsmart, outmaneuver, and outgun your enemies in this pure tactical top-down shooter. Master the innovative cover system, exploit blind spots, and land one-shot kills. In Sphere Shootout, your brain is your deadliest weapon.

Key Features:

  • Dynamic Cover System

  • Lethal One-Shot Combat

  • Outsmart & Ambush

Use the fog of war to your advantage. Crouch behind cover to stay hidden, plan your ambushes, and strike when your enemies least expect it!

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Traditional Chinese, Turkish

reviews.review_text:
Honestly, this game is way more fun than I expected.

At first, the visuals looked pretty simple, so I thought it might be just another average shooter. But once I started playing, I got hooked fast.
It’s not just mindless shooting — cover, positioning, and timing actually matter, which makes every fight feel tense and rewarding.

Some firefights only last a few seconds, but there’s a real mind game to them, and winning those exchanges feels great.

You can tell the developer actually cared about making the gameplay solid. The core mechanics feel tight, and the whole game has that “easy to pick up, hard to put down” feeling.

If you like PvP games with a bit of tactical depth, this is definitely worth checking out.
Hope this game does really well.
